question: Which language instruction best describes the robot's trajectory shown in the image?
choices: Grab the clear bag with the gripper
Pick up the clear bag from the place
Push the clear bag towards the place
Slide the clear bag to the right
place some of the clear bag contents on the empty paper plate
correct_choice: place some of the clear bag contents on the empty paper plate
